options.name: --generator
options.description:
(Default: mssql) The generator to use while
generating (mssql, postgres). Defaults to mssql.

options.name: --tableName
options.description: The table from which to create the class.

options.name: --connectionString
options.description:
Required. The connection string to a SQL Server
database. Required.

options.name: --path
options.description: The path to which to save the class.

options.name: --namespace
options.description:
The namespace in which the class will be created.
Defaults to a name based on the database.

options.name: --force
options.description:
Force the file to be created, overwriting an
existing file if necessary.

options.name: --extensions
options.description: Create class extensions for CRUD operations.

options.name: --delete
options.description: Delete existing classes prior to generation
